title: Ritual Voltage
concept: A night-long ritual disguised as a dancefloor — rolling psy-trance bass and tribal drums built for bodies that have stopped pretending they came here to think.
statement: Hypnotic, dark, physical and spiritual without religion — acid spirals and taiko hits under cinematic risers, Portuguese guitar shimmer used only as a ghost-texture underneath the voltage.
visualIdentity: Black velvet and deep violet lit by a single ritual fire, laser haze cutting through smoke, tribal masks rendered in chrome instead of wood.
musicalStyle: Rolling psy-trance bass, tight kick, acid spirals, tribal drums, toms, taiko hits, dark cinematic risers, metallic delays, deep sub movement, nylon guitar shimmer as texture only.
